590(अ) तारीख 2 जून, 1989 7ारा !कािशत कये गए थे, और अिधसूचना सं6यांक 935(अ) तारीख 18 दस बर, 2019 7ारा इनम: अंितम "प से संशोधन कया गया था। MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th December, 2019 G.S.R. 959(E).—Whereas, the draft rules further to amend the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 were published, as required under sub-section (1) of section 212 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 (59 of 1988), vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)] Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 Highways published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section (3), Sub-section (i), vide notification number G.S.R 523(E), dated the 24th day of July, 2019, inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby before the expiry of the period of thirty days from the date of which copies of the Gazette containing the said notification were made available to the public; And whereas, copies of the said Gazette notification were made available to the public on the 24th July, 2019; And whereas, the objections and suggestions received from the public in respect of the said draft rules have been considered by the Central Government; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 110 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 (59 of 1988), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, namely.- 1. Short title and commencement.- (1) These rules may be called as the Central Motor Vehicles (Fifteenth Amendment) Rules, 2019. (2) Save as otherwise provided in these rules, they shall come into force on the 1st day of March, 2020. 2. In the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, in rule 62, in sub rule (1), in the proviso, in the TABLE,- (a) after serial number 18 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely:- Sr. No. Item Check Fitment Check makes/ type/ rating etc. as per original equipment recommend- dations. Check condition Check functioning Test Remark (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) (7) (8) “(19) Priority Seats, Signs, securing of crutches/ canes/walker, hand rail/stanchions, controls at priority seats for differently abled passengers and passengers with reduced mobility. Yes No Yes Yes No Ensure that the provisions of sub-rules (1) and (7) of rule 125C of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 are complied with.”; (b) after serial number 19 and entries as so inserted, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted with effect from the 1st day of October, 2020, namely:- Sr. No. Item Check Fitment Check makes/ type/ rating etc. as per original equipment recommend- dations. Check condition Check functioning Test Remark (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) (7) (8) “(20) Wheel chair entry/housing/ locking arrangement for Yes No Yes Yes No Ensure that the provisions of sub-rules (1) and (7) of rule 125C -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] wheel chair for differently abled passengers and passengers with reduced mobility. of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 are complied with.”. [F. No. RT-11028/02/2019-MVL] PRIYANK BHARTI, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide notification number G.S.R. 590(E), dated the 2nd June, 1989 and lastly amended vide notification number G.S.R. 935(E) dated 18th December, 2019.
